article_meta.title: PoliticsMeet the New Proud BoysThe far-right group's views and tactics are now emulated by federal agents.By Ali BrelandIllustration by The Atlantic

reasoning: Correct Left classification with high but reasonable confidence given strong, explicit left-leaning authorial framing. Evidence mostly cites author prose; minor issue: inclusion of outlet reputation and some vague indicators.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: Article is clearly Left: author equates DHS/Trump admin with far-right militias, uses loaded descriptors, and frames harms to immigrants/protesters.

custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Provides at least one specific author-phrase indicator (e.g., 'far-right', 'white-supremacist propaganda'), but also relies on outlet reputation and several vague, non-quoted generalities.
